# hush_apigee_access_credential (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about an Apigee access credential in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hush_apigee_access_credential" "example" {
  id = "acr-eu12345678"
}

output "name" {
  value = data.hush_apigee_access_credential.example.name
}

output "has_provider_credentials" {
  value = data.hush_apigee_access_credential.example.has_provider_credentials
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Apigee access credential

### Read-Only

- `deployment_ids` (List of String) List of deployment IDs that can access this credential
- `description` (String) The description of the Apigee access credential
- `has_provider_credentials` (Boolean) Whether the credential uses provider credentials (no explicit service account key)
- `kind` (String) The kind of access credential
- `name` (String) The name of the Apigee access credential
- `type` (String) The type of access credential
